name: Deercrow
text: Summon Requirement: If summoned by sacrificing "Scarecrow" or "Big Buck", send 1 of them back to your deck, then shuffle. This card receives 2x effects from Common / Uncommon magic cards for Hit, Atk, Atk Dice Rolls, and SPD.
